notes: Third-party TouchDesigner files are executable local artifacts. Download into runtime only, smoke-test in a blank project, then decide what to import.
Do not commit downloaded .toe or .tox files unless a future example intentionally vendors them with license and smoke-test notes.

entries.name: Embody / Envoy
entries.touchdesigner_fit: Live TouchDesigner MCP bridge and diffable TDN workflow. Import manually and bind Envoy to localhost.
entries.intake_notes: Powerful local automation bridge. Enable only in trusted projects and keep localhost-only.

entries.name: RayTK 0.37
entries.touchdesigner_fit: Pinned to a TD-2023-era RayTK release instead of the TD-2025-oriented latest release.
entries.intake_notes: Attribute RayTK/tekt. Smoke-test with TD 2023.11600 before importing into the Spotify patch.

entries.name: Useful TouchDesigner Toxes
entries.touchdesigner_fit: Created in TouchDesigner 2023.11600, matching the local target.
entries.intake_notes: Good first audition pack for post-album-art effects. Prefer Engine COMP if chaining multiple heavy effects.

entries.name: 13 Tap Bloom
entries.touchdesigner_fit: High quality bloom component with a small source repo and clear license.
entries.intake_notes: Designed for linear/HDR pipelines. Confirm color-space handling before replacing the built-in bloom lane.

entries.name: ISF TouchDesigner Parser
entries.touchdesigner_fit: Lets TouchDesigner host ISF GLSL generators and filters from Text DATs.
entries.intake_notes: Test with a tiny ISF shader first, then wire TD audio bands into exposed ISF parameters.

entries.name: VIDVOX ISF Files
entries.touchdesigner_fit: MIT-licensed collection of ISF generators and filters for use with the ISF parser.
entries.intake_notes: Load individual shaders into isfParser rather than importing the whole library into a show patch.

entries.name: TouchDesigner Dominant Color
entries.touchdesigner_fit: KMeans color extraction component that can inspire or replace album-art palette logic.
entries.intake_notes: Older TD/Python dependency notes. Use as reference first; prefer the repo bridge's lightweight artwork hash path for live-critical use.

entries.name: MaxMainio TD_ Core Visual Components
entries.touchdesigner_fit: Large MIT component library; sparse fetch only the pieces most relevant to Spotify visuals.
entries.intake_notes: The author describes the collection as living/unfinished. Smoke-test each component before show use.

entries.name: okVJ Shared
entries.touchdesigner_fit: Local sandbox candidate for a VJ UI, MIDI mapping, sequencer, modulators, and audio analysis.
entries.intake_notes: GPL-3.0. Keep local unless we intentionally design a GPL-compatible derivative workflow.

entries.name: GeoPix
entries.touchdesigner_fit: Full open-source lighting control and previz app built in TouchDesigner, useful for future LED/pixel mapping research.
entries.intake_notes: Large full application and older TD target. Study separately before mixing with Spotify Fluid Map.

entries.name: Derivative Mapping Palette
entries.touchdesigner_fit: Built-in Kantan Mapper, CamSchnappr, Projector Blend, Stoner, Quad Reproject, Vioso, and Corner Pin tools.
entries.intake_notes: Use the Palette versions first. These are the show-facing mapping tools before community mapping experiments.
